svg.title: Estimated daily smartphone screen time by country
svg.desc: Estimated daily smartphone screen time by country. Source: DataReportal Digital 2025 and industry estimates. Figures are estimates and vary by methodology; mobile-first countries tend to rank higher.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Estimated daily smartphone screen time by country

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: DataReportal Digital 2025 and industry estimates — Figures are estimates and vary by methodology; mobile-first countries tend to rank higher.
